title: galactia stenophylla var. genuina
intro: Galactia stenophylla var. genuina, also known as False Millefolium or False White Milkweed, is a perennial plant species in the pea family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, providing various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Galactia stenophylla var. genuina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and skin problems.
